steps.title: Find the main reversal
steps.content: The passage explains that people once thought tool use was unique to primates, then gives sea otters and woodpecker finches as evidence that this belief is wrong.

steps.title: Reject narrower claims
steps.content: Choice A contradicts the idea that tools make goals easier. Choice B focuses only on sea otters and adds an unsupported comparison with primates. Choice D says many myths, but the passage addresses one. The answer is C.
